title: Invite teammates to join Grafana Cloud

blocks.content:
User management in Grafana Cloud provides flexible role-based access control, allowing you to grant specific permissions based on team members' responsibilities. You can invite users as viewers, editors, or admins, ensuring each person has the right level of access to contribute effectively.

These steps happen in the Grafana Cloud Portal at grafana.com, not inside your Grafana Cloud stack.
In this section, you'll open the Cloud Portal in a new tab and invite a user to your organization.
Open the Grafana Cloud Portal at grafana.com in a new browser tab.
Sign in if needed. On the left side menu, scroll until you see **Org Settings** and click **Members**.
Enter the **Email**, select a **Role** (Admin, Editor, or Viewer), optionally check **Receive billing emails**, then click **Invite**.
The invited users receive an email invitation with instructions to join your Grafana Cloud organization. After they accept, they can collaborate with your team.
In the next milestone, you'll navigate to the documentation to find and install a data source for connecting your systems to Grafana Cloud.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Configure authentication and authorization](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/account-management/authentication-and-permissions/)
- [Security and account management](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/account-management/)
